BatchAddSnatRules.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters, see [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md)
BatchAddSnatRules.snatRules: Internal IP address or CIDR block
BatchAddSnatRules.snatRules.ruleName: Rule name consisting of uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, and special characters -\_ /., must start with a letter, length 1-65
BatchAddSnatRules.snatRules.publicIpsAddress: List of public IP addresses, EIPs or IPs from shared bandwidth associated with the NAT gateway SNAT
BatchAddSnatRules.snatRules.sourceCIDR: Internal IP address or CIDR block
